name: comfyui-codex
description: Codex guidance and read-only tooling for ComfyUI installation, Manager, custom nodes, APIs, workflows, models, prompting, troubleshooting, and agent-safe execution.

interface.shortDescription: Build, lint, audit, and debug ComfyUI workflows.
interface.longDescription: ComfyUI Codex gives Codex a focused operating guide and read-only tool suite for ComfyUI installation paths, ComfyUI-Manager, custom nodes, local ComfyUI Server API work, Comfy Cloud API context, workflow JSON authoring, model routing, prompting, troubleshooting, beginner onboarding, offline fixture validation, and agent-safe workflow execution patterns.
defaultPrompt: Use $comfyui to debug my ComfyUI workflow.
Use $comfyui to build an API-format workflow.
Use $comfyui to explain ComfyUI to a beginner.
